text:
There once was a little gnome quiet boy named Oliver. He loved listening to old folktales late at night.

One night his owl friend whispered something spooky.

"Oliver why do owls have holes?"

"Oh oh nothing."

Oliver fell asleep.

The next morning he discovered.

Owl holes were book holes.

Now Oliver couldn't sleep alone. Owl night reading.

One quiet night Oliver read.

"The Hobbit." That night was different.

Oliver dreamed Bilbo took him on adventures. Flying mountains.

Bigger things.

That dream held a flashlight.

Next day.

Begging uncle.

He found treasure.

Oliver found himself.

A hero.

And stars.

That's how heroism begins.




So true ?

Tell me something sweet.

No cookies??

You know you love me.


I just might buy.

You know that.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
